open_items.description: Verify the integrity of the autonomy pilot's initial seed configuration to ensure it matches the expected baseline and has not been tampered with or corrupted.

response: Identified one bounded follow-up item: verify the integrity of the autonomy pilot's initial seed configuration. This item is preserved as an open item and a single wake is scheduled to resolve it using the specified recall target.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the open item by retrieving the stored seed configuration baseline and comparing it against the current live state.
